caption: A man in a black jacket is seated in the back of a white vehicle, speaking through an open window. Several microphones from news outlets, including "ANI" and "NATION," are held up toward him. The scene takes place outdoors, and the surrounding environment is obscured by the car and the news crew's equipment. The screen is filled with news graphics and text in Hindi. A red banner at the top reads "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है" across most frames, though the first frame shows "कॅं" in the top left. On the left and right sides, small portrait photos of men appear with accompanying text such as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार," and "विजय चौधरी." The "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo and the website "news18india.com" are visible in the top right. A timestamp at the bottom indicates "10:02 PM." As the sequence progresses, the text overlays shift and the man continues talking.
